speaker: MATT
raw_text: So we're getting this figured out. They'll stay in play as long as they can. They are three hours ahead of us. To be fair, we have friends across the coast that get up at 4am to watch this

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back guys! We have some interesting aspects of playing tonight Orion Acaba will be here shortly, he's currently stuck in traffic. Unfortunately we will not have a Sam Riegel tonight, due to his schedule.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Laura Bailey and Travis Willingham, our loving Grog and Vex, are out of town in Florida but are Skyping in via modern technology.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Technology? What's it all about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can actually see you guys pretty good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're going to try and make this work.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: We're getting audio set up right now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: They managed to convince to help them as well, fought their way through the tunnels, past the Duergar army, eventually to the underground Mindflayer colony of Yogg Voril where they found that this entity called K'varn. This was then eventually revealed to be a mad beholder, K'varn, who had been pseudo possessed and given additional power by the Horn of Orcus, a great and evil artifact long forgotten, which had been found by this entity. So they managed to make their way into the temple, kill K'varn, tear the horn from it's forehead, however found themselves swarmed immediately by an entire colony of mind flayers heading toward the top of this temple. They managed to battle and battle, nearly losing a few party members, and through some ingenuity, escape through the top, glide over the city of Yogg Voril through this underground chasm to a distant embankment along the beachside of this underground lake. And teleport their way back to their base city of Emon. So they've come back to Emon, they've come to their keep, Greyskull Keep, and they've had an evening of rest. Upon waking the next morning, they've managed to get some breakfast, they've freed Lady Kima from her stone entrapment as she was turned to stone during the battle with the beholder, and had a conversation based around what should or could be done about this Horn of Orcus evil artifact. So here we will pick up again from that point. So the rest of you guys have eaten your meal, Kima hungrily doing so. All of you guys both sore and exhausted having barely seen sunlight for a little over a week and being probably the first or second good meal you've had since leaving Kraghammer proper. You all finish your food, Grog hungrily so, double the size of his normal intake of delicious meats and starches. Tiberius has not seemed to have woken up or found his way down from his room as of yet. However, you guys did recently receive a rolled up piece of parchment. A notification from the council of Tal’Dorei, saying that you have been requested to the council chambers at some point this afternoon, around the mid-day sun, to discuss your return and the situation and conditions about it. And that was all it said.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you can look forward to episodes up on the Geek & Sundry website every Monday. That's the scenario.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, given that case, whenever Orion gets here he'll hop in, in the meantime, let's go ahead and start this game up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, for those of us who --

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just a little heads up here, the party has just returned after a long arduous trek through The Underdark, beneath the Dwarven city of Kraghammer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They were sent to retrieve a paladin named Lady Kima of Vord, who was on a vision quest to stop some dark evil that her deity Bahamut told her was existing beneath this mountain range, and needed to be squelched.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The party managed to salvage her from insidious torture, and through her aid as well as a Mind Flayer who had been outcast from the society and the colony nearby.

speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As a couple hours have passed --

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But we haven't told her that it's in the bag of holding right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No you just said you have it somewhere safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We just said we have it somewhere safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Turn them up a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am highly entertained.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we're getting feedback.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, that's us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right! That would be us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry about that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We'll figure this out guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't too bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the new attempt at technology with our out-of-towners.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's working pretty well.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It is working pretty well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm kind of impressed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have we actually opened up the parchment and read it yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you have received it and you've inspected it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's Tiberius.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hey everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey boo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what's going to happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's going to crawl under the table. There you have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good morning sleepyhead.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hi guys.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You've just now come down after many hours of breakfast have passed. It's now pushing around 11:00 in the afternoon comparatively, and Tiberius comes storming into the main dining hall of your keep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We just said we have it somewhere safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.text: We'll figure this out guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't too bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm kind of impressed.

preceding_turns.text: Have we actually opened up the parchment and read it yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY

preceding_turns.text: Hey everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's going to crawl under the table. There you have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good morning sleepyhead.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hi guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a couple hours have passed --

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good morning Tiberius.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hi. Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hello.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Am I here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes you've just come down the stairs.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It said around the noon day sun. It's probably about 30 minutes give or take.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Another 500?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That's all I do. That's all I want to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Have we had contact with Allura? Since returning?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nuh uh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel good about her being at this meeting.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Someone just got really excited when we mentioned the name Allura.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I cast prestidigitation on myself and make robes are all super clean and nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys walk into the center of the Cloudtop District, you can see that her ivory tower, which once collapsed around you, is now standing in it's previous location, seemingly untouched and back to it's original esteemed visual.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is the question, do we stop in first or do we go straight to --

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Was there a time requested on there?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can hear it echo throughout the interior of the tall standing tower. A few moments pass, you hear the movement of chain. A creaking of metal and then a -- some sort of large shifting of a wood platform or plank. The door then creaks open and there standing, a little bleary eyed, slept-in a bit, but in the process of getting ready, you see before you Arcanist Allura. Her long blonde hair is half braided. She's in her darkened blue robes. You're used to seeing her in and see -- She opens the door, the sunlight hitting her eye. She protects her vision for a second before they focus on the rest of the group and she goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You come around the corner on the fine kind of yellowish cobblestone road, turn, and you get to the point where you can see to the left of you is the giant courtyard that surrounds the outskirts of the palace proper. With the giant steps that lead up to the darkened purple marble that the entire structure is made out of. To your right, there's a few buildings and the white ivory tower that Allura lives in. You approach, the front door is closed. It still remains that giant iron knocker on the front that hangs loosely, like a giant wishbone that you slam into the front of the wooden doorway.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Give it a couple hits? (Vax nods)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Things have been a bit crazy here, obviously. Now that the floodgates have opened as far as discussions with the council and people who have maintained a backlog for a while. It's been a bit busy. But, this is a wonderful moment to respite. I'm greatly enjoying the company to be honest. Come."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Allie?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Allura starts heading back into her tower and says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well? Come. Enter. I have tea ready."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well? Come. Enter. I have tea ready."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well? Come. Enter. I have tea ready. You all look like you could use it to be honest."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Come. Please."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I love tea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We have a moment we can spend.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Long story.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys all walk into her tower, you remember it untouched from your previous entry here. It's a weird moment to step into a tower that you were once in as it crumbled and folded on itself, to see it as if nothing had ever happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is there a new rug?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is not.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ah-hah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hmm..

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're not giving it back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We shouldn't tell her about the rug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't tell her about the rug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys step into the center of the room and she's talking to herself for a moment, saying

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Best that you can gather, she looks like she's a bit groggy, having slept in recently. But she seems extremely excited you've all returned and seems eager to catch up as far as what has transpired since last you met her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've gotten into the idea that a lot of these powerful mage-built towers, the inner workings don't really match the outer exterior look. And there are rooms that shouldn't exist at certain points as you lift up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to make a perfunctory insight check just to see if there's anything hinky.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to google perfunctory real quick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can do that. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On Allura?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, everything's probably fine. That's an 18.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's been awhile since I've been here. Everything's as grandiose and unnecessarily dressed as it always is. I'm glad you got rid of that old rug though."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do hear, as soon as you arrive, it sounds like the whistle of a tea kettle in the distance. At which point, she says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah! Allow me."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And she begins to walk over. She lifts her hand and you see a small drift of arcane energy as her mage hand goes and lifts, takes the water off of it's burner, and begins to absent mindedly mage-hand various teacups out of a large cabinet above the little kitchenette area.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's awesome. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, everyone's looking around, Kima, amongst the rest of you guys, says,

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Those who currently reside on the council are trustworthy, I assure you this. I've done my work with them for many years, and those that have passed have been replaced with equally trustworthy individuals. And, rest assured, I have my checks and balances in place as well."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know much of this object you say, but if it was the source of the creature's power, and it carries with it the connotations of Orcus, then this is a very, very ill omen indeed."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This must be brought before the council immediately."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The council?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: The council?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The council of Tal'Dorei, the council you are part of."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That helps.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you going there, right now, also?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, I was summoned to it."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We were as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Here's the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, Pike. The thing with this particular item is, the more people know about it, the more dangerous it actually becomes. The fact that we even share this information with Kima and with you is a very dangerous thing to begin with.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I agree."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Are the council trustworthy?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "That is possible. Like I've said, these magics have not been tampered with in nearly 200 years."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: But the memory thing is crucial.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What about those who might be uncomfortable with toying around with my memories and tramping along around in my head, I don't really want --

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you think about it for a while?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My head's pretty fragile as it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're talking about erasing the path back to this thing, we're not talking about removing your adolescent years from your memory. Just this one thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How many lessons have we learned in just the time. Wouldn't we have to erase all memories surrounding it? We wouldn't even remember our trip into the underdark?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think we could perhaps just erase the memory of where we put it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That is what I assume will happen.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I suppose I should introduce myself as well. I've heard much about you, Vox Machina. I am Arbiter Braum Goldhand. I have recently taken up as of three months ago the position that General Kreig once held within the city. Since he was unfortunately lost to us, there was a need for a new master of law. As since I've had a lot to keep up on. Unable to meet you personally until now, but it is a pleasure. I've heard nothing but great things."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm terribly, sorry. I did not mean for there to be any sort of misunderstanding here."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He gives a slight nudge to Tofor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I do not believe we've met at this time. My name is Seeker Asum Emring. I am the master of secrets here within the council."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He extends his hand towards you, almost like alleviating the tension.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Hi. Stormwind here. Seeker Asum: "I assume you're the ones we're waiting for, please have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which the sovereign finishes discussion with another human which you have not met. He is a built and armored individual, stands probably the tallest of the entire group, thick square jaw, unshaven. At which point he puts his hand on the sovereign's shoulder and says,

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "All right. First of all, I want to welcome you all back. It's been a few weeks since we've seen each other. I've been recently given word that you unceremoniously appeared in the center of the Lyceum not but twelve hours ago, worse for wear. So I would like to know, first off, why you've returned in the center of our city. And I want to see how you've all been these past few weeks. I apologize if I'm a bit scattered I’ve had a few things on my mind as of late. But yes, how is Vox Machina."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I suppose I should introduce myself as well. I've heard much about you, Vox Machina. I am Arbiter Braum Goldhand. I have recently taken up as of three months ago the position that General Kreig once held within the city. Since he was unfortunately lost to us, there was a need for a new master of law. As since I've had a lot to keep up on. Unable to meet you personally until now, but it is a pleasure. I've heard nothing but great things."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He sits down in his chair. Allura finds her side of the table and gestures the rest of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Please, have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I stand. I don't sit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The overeign finishes writing some papers, rolls them up, snaps twice, and a gentleman comes by. He hands him the papers and says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Get this to Lady and Lord Briarwood as soon as possible, thank you."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "All right. First of all, I want to welcome you all back. It's been a few weeks since we've seen each other. I've been recently given word that you unceremoniously appeared in the center of the Lyceum not but twelve hours ago, worse for wear. So I would like to know, first off, why you've returned in the center of our city. And I want to see how you've all been these past few weeks. I apologize if I'm a bit scattered I’ve had a few things on my mind as of late. But yes, how is Vox Machina."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I suppose I should introduce myself as well. I've heard much about you, Vox Machina. I am Arbiter Braum Goldhand. I have recently taken up as of three months ago the position that General Kreig once held within the city. Since he was unfortunately lost to us, there was a need for a new master of law. As since I've had a lot to keep up on. Unable to meet you personally until now, but it is a pleasure. I've heard nothing but great things."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He sits down in his chair. Allura finds her side of the table and gestures the rest of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Please, have a seat."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I stand. I don't sit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The overeign finishes writing some papers, rolls them up, snaps twice, and a gentleman comes by. He hands him the papers and says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Get this to Lady and Lord Briarwood as soon as possible, thank you."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "By the fastest ships, especially if we're using some of your fancy sky dinghies. I can't imagine more than two weeks?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I look to the group and do this to Scanlan. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Taking quite advantage of his current state of mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: You have no idea what I'm going to do for the rest of this game.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You literally do that to Scanlan. Like you... to Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No, I was pointing at him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right in the ear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Wet willy. To our little gnome bard.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We miss you Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uriel looks around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, given the circumstance I would say that our best bet now is to have Kima and Tofor reach out to the grand chambers of Bahamut. Have them bring a vessel and seal it somewhere that they find fit for an object of this dark presence. Is the council in agreement of this? Unless some other, better means arises. How long will it take for this vessel to arrive?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, Kima scratches her chin for a second.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As he exits, Tofor stands up. You've only seen her sitting since you arrived. As Tofor stands in her female dragonborn form, she is probably a good solid foot taller than Tiberius. And is a thick musclebound dragonborn paladin of Bahamut. Her armor shifts as she stands, she begins to make her way towards the door, not even with a glance in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. It is settled. Reach out to your clergy. Bring the vessel. Allura, facilitate its arrival. We will get this artifact as far away from Emon as possible. This is adjourned. Thank you all very much for coming to this council meeting."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to catch the sovereign on his way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. At which point everyone gathers the rest of their papers, their parchments, they're rolling up scrolls. The Arbiter gets up and lumbers his way out of the room. The seeker, Asum, steps up to the rest of you with a final handshake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "A pleasure to meet you all, once again, I've heard so much. You're doing fine work."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He seems strangely nervous. But in a weird way, he's a gentle hint of fanboy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wink at him. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He slyly winks back on his way out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "They were but a week ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: That means she's as tall as you, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: She's as tall as you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I just whisper to Tiberius and say,

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are all the ladies that big in Draconia?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It all depends. Not really.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's bigger than usual.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: She's a wretched peasant so I can not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's so mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a little harsh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Allura stands up and begins to leave. The sovereign stands up and as he stands up the guards come out and they come to his side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Good Sovereign, if I can have a moment? Did I hear correctly that Lord and Lady Briarwood were in town?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Whatever business you need to get done. It should take no more than two days to get this taken care of."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She looks to Allura, questioning Allura.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "In the event of this blessed chamber arriving, you will be notified. We will request your presence to bring the artifact in question, seal it, and then we will begin our journey over to its place of hopeful destruction and/or proper banishment."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Would you like anyone to go with you or you just want to go alone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: To work out the details of all of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Allura says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "For me, it's just preparation of the arcane transference ritual. I'm going to go meet with a friend of mine over in Ostania."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will say we haven't replenished our potions yet. And we could go --

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Should we go to visit our old friend?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could go to Gilmore's.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could go to Gilmore's.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore's Glorious Goods?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You essentially want us to wait?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "So two days. We'll call for you when the item is to be transferred and properly brought to its destination. In the meantime, prepare as you see fit, enjoy this well-earned rest, and we'll take it from there. I have much travel to do myself. See you all very soon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You did this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I really have to get to work on this."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She leaves the group and continues down the hallway. Quick steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Bye, Kima! Quick steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot of math involved in that equation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Allura chuckles to herself and steps into the place where she was and goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I care not to solve the puzzle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, as a note. Be careful who you ask those questions to, you may get an earful."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Allura smiles and motions towards Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Don't get me wrong, you're more than welcome to explore as you like, but that's a rabbit hole my friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A rabbit hole, is that what we're calling it these days?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You feel a gentle slap from some unknown arcane force across your cheek Grog. And Allura gives you a stern glare.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, don't talk about her girl that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't make me take my earrings off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyway.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So at this point now you’re pushing about two in the afternoon. It’s extremely busy, you can hear the clopping of horse hooves on the ground, people are walking past. You’d swear as you’re stepping through the city, maybe a handful of people tend to stop and watch you guys walk through, stunned. Almost like they’d seen a celebrity on the street, as the most recent makeup of the Winter’s Crest festival was a celebration of you being the heroes who saved the city of Emon and the sovereign and his family. Apparently you are now recognizable within the city of Emon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Shaun Gilmore himself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shaun Gilmore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys --

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is that his first name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I didn’t know Shaun was his first name either.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I didn’t know Shaun was his first name either.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You’ve not been paying attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Shaun Gilmore, but you’ve always called him Gilmore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We’re on a first-name basis now, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No one’s on a first-name basis with Gilmore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We are.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Gilmore is Gilmore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Except for maybe Vax over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Except for maybe, maybe Vax.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And she goes in the back room, rummages around for a minute, comes out and she presents two of them. They have a clear liquid that looks almost like dirty water, and they’re like thin little vials, she goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That’ll be 2550 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And she pulls out the six that are there and she kinda slides them over the counter to you. One tips over but she catches it, leaves it there at the far end.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Careful with those.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They’re fine, they can take a beating, they’re designed that way."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So can I.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She pushes her glasses up and looks vastly unimpressed at the presentation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much were the superiors again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The superiors were 1500 brought down to 1200 apiece, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 1200. Which came to 36?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thirty-six.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So do you have anything, we keep getting turned into stone, it’s been sort of a running theme. We were hoping you might have something to help alleviate stone skin or any --

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We do have potions of petrification removal."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Petrification removal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think. Let me check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "No, I’m afraid those were all purchased. However, we may have more in a few weeks or so. They take some time to create and the ingredients are a little bit scarce. However, trade is opening, perhaps --"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was really good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It’s awesome, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That would be 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It’s a good thing. She gives you a look and goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don’t like you." (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thirteen hundred."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thirteen hundred, lovely, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sherri? It was Sherri, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you have any books on how to learn how to start making your own potions? Or do you know of any classes in town where maybe I could sign up for like a potion workshop?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Nothing here, but that’s not a bad idea, might run that past Gilmore."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You should offer a workshop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You should absolutely offer a workshop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That’s a good idea,"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You should absolutely offer a workshop. "otherwise the Lyceum would be the place to look."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The Lyceum?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Do you have any potions of strength or any ability potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She leaves for a second, then comes back and goes,

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "That ring runs 6500 gold. We have a ring of psychic resistance that does protect yourself from various mental intrusions. We have a ring of evasion that can be utilized three times a day, or one to three times a day. Should one of you not be quite quick enough to avoid any sort of incoming danger. You could allow yourself a successful escape. That runs 4500. We also have a ring of water walking. This one has been popular in the past for some various traveling troupes that wish to do various performances that require defying the surface of water. It gets a bit shifty now that I think about it, but you know, whatever folks will enjoy. Peasantry is easily pleased. So those are our rings at the moment. Should any of those tickle your fancy, please do let me know. Here --"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Armaments, what kind of armaments you got?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, if you’ll follow me."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She leads you up the stairway to the second floor. The second floor itself is just a series of glass cases that are leaned at an angle. In these cases you can see there are different items just laid out, small labels at the bottom with

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. a brief description of the enchantment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She leads you across, she goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, first we’ll start here with the ring section."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see there’s a small case that has along this purplish velvet pillow, a bunch of different rings set out. She goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We have varying degrees of rings of protection. These rings are designed to protect the individual who wears, we have one I believe with the basic enchantment, and one with one step higher above that."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The equivalent of a ring of protection +2.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you pull out the basilisk eggs, you pull it out and immediately there is a stench that is emanating from these eggs that have been in your bag of holding for probably close to eight or nine months.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was the white dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it was the white dragon you killed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That’s the one that you got the final blow on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was your persuasion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That’s the one that you got the final blow on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not worth the memory of killing a white dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What was your persuasion?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not worth the memory of killing a white dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I know, I gotta keep it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Gotta keep it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Keepsake, can’t put a price on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten. Ten, they rolled a ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They rolled a ten. She says,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Dragons’ teeth actually, strangely enough, are a little easier to find. I would put, each dragon’s tooth available would probably add about 250 gold pieces to the exchange."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We’ve got three.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And how about the basilisk eggs? While we’re --

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Get it out out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: --cleaning our bag out, exactly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have two basilisk eggs we’re willing to part with.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About an hour and a half, time passes before eventually there’s a loud clattering at the front of Gilmore’s Glorious Goods, where a laughing Vax and Gilmore come stumbling in, flush of face, with emptied goblets, laughing to themselves. Is there anything specific before this moment that you wanted to ask --

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I want to thank you. I don’t know that I would be standing here if not for your help.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Had it not been for Gilmore’s Glorious Goods." (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He looks you deep in the eyes, pats the top of your hand, and goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Vax. This, that moment, that is why I do what I do."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You’re a unique man, Gilmore. No question. Never met anyone quite like you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well. Would you care to share a glass of wine with a man not quite like anyone else you’ve met?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Indeed. What do you recommend in the area?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, please, come, there are casks that pour the finest of honeyed Syngoran wine. I know perhaps you’ve not been home for quite some time?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That’s a complicated thing for me, one that I’m not really quite ready to talk about yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe someday.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Maybe with enough wine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You old so-and-so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You old so-and-so.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He collects himself for a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I took the duergar, I was holding her right over the cliff, and I just cut, and she fell! She fell! I didn’t know what I was doing, I just did it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You are ridiculous, Vax'ildan! Oh, it tickles me."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hi! Hello!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, good to see your friends."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sounds like you had fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Family. Family, family. I’ve had a couple of drinks. I’m an adult, I can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What have you found? Have you guys been shopping?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we have!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we have!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We were hoping that you and Gilmore had a wonderful time and that, we just thought we’d wait for you. We didn’t want to make any final decisions without one of our main party members.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It was delightful. You travel with the finest companion. We told stories, we cried, we laughed. It was a delight."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I’ve had a few."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "How about we open a 25,000 gold piece line of credit here with Gilmore’s Glorious Goods that you only need to pay back within the next month."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don’t you want us to advertise in Westruun for you? "immortalized Gilmore’s Glorious Armor."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We would, Gilmore, we would be wearing that. Again, we nearly died. The armor that you gave me is gone, and I’m lucky to be alive today, and that armor helped me be where I am at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How much credit do you wish to open?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fifty gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thousand? Fifty thousand?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fifty, ah yes. Fifty thousand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Because 50 gold I can definitely do."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We’ve been out drinking for two hours, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This is true. I’m sorry."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: One million, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That’s a tough order."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You mentioned you had money waiting for you in Kraghammer. How much was --"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How much is waiting for you there?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Twenty-five, wasn’t it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was 25,000.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "So. Twenty-five thousand gold line of credit, within a month or you’ll be hunted."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Easy enough to fix."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was going to put it on that leather.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was going to put it on that leather.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was going to put it on that leather. My mom gave this to me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, your mother has not provided for you the means of keeping the deal we already made."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can you take this off when we pay you back and put it on that one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think it’ll transfer when you change.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Will it transfer when I change armor?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don’t know." (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We’ll find out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I can work on plate armor if you’d like, but an enchantment of that magnitude would be the only enchantment it would have. So it would be the equivalent of full plate armor and the entire enchantment would enable you to move a little more easily inside it, and that would cost, it would take about, I'd say, a month to enchant on my end and would cost about, not including the cost of the actual armor, materials and time required, I’d put it at about 8,000 gold pieces?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Move two on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it’s not 100 gold per platinum, ten gold per platinum.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I’ve been saying ten gold per platinum this whole time, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I’m with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We’re losing our audience. Ring it up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We’re getting into math in this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Our charity, 826LA, after-school tutoring.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It could’ve made this all go so much better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Really good to have,

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It could’ve made this all go so much better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Your reading and your writing and your arithmetic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: For players who can read good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For players who can read good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ring it up, we’ll take it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We’ll take it all.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The whole lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And then, could I commission you, by the way, to maybe make some armor that’s really heavy armor but very quiet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How heavy?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How heavy can you make it?
